channel.title: Posts on sainnhe's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on sainnhe's blog

item.title: Sexy & Powerful Configuration for Lightline and Tmux
item.description: Nerd Font First of all, install a nerd font, and apply it: nerd font Then, pick a unicode over here: nerd font cheat sheet. In this case, search keyword sep After getting the unicode number, you can use it like this: :echo "\ue0b9" FAQ: Why are my nerdfont symbols not displaying correctly? The display of nerdfont can be affected by many factors, including terminal emulator, font type, font size, zoom, etc.

item.title: 在 GitHub Pages 上搭建个人博客
item.description: 创建 Github Pages 新建一个 GitHub 仓库，仓库名为 <username>.github.io，其中 <username> 是你的用户名（不是昵称）。 比如我的用户名是 &ld
